topic: Converting and applying fractions, decimals, percentages
title: Real-life conversions
instruction: Answer these questions about converting and using fractions, decimals and percentages.

questions.question: A news article says: '1 in 5 people in the UK rent their home.' What percentage is this?
A food label says a product contains '0.25g of salt per 100g'. How do you say '0.25'?
A bank offers '2.5% interest'. Which fraction is equivalent to 2.5%?
A jacket costs £120. It is reduced by 0.2 (20%). What is the saving?
You score 18 out of 24 on a test. What is your score as a percentage?
